summary: Rename the `cell` value in `production sweep`'s inner loop from `c` to `pt` so it no longer shadows the API client.
reason: Greptile review (P2) flagged variable shadowing — the inner-loop `c := cell{...}` shadowed the outer API client `c`. No current runtime bug (the `pvgisPVcalc(c, ...)` call happens before the shadow), but any future edit that moves the call below the shadow would silently fail. Renamed to remove the trap.
